name: Future Country Club
address: 6500 SW Archer Rd Suite G, Gainesville, FL 32608
about: Future Country Club is a members-only indoor golf facility located in Gainesville, Florida, featuring two private locations with premium golf simulator technology. The club offers 24/7 access for members to book tee times via an app, regardless of weather conditions, with a focus on private indoor bays equipped with high-fidelity Uneekor simulators. Membership includes access to both locations, a pro shop, member events, leagues, and discounted lessons with their Head Pro, Tyler. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels from beginners to advanced players, with a pricing model currently sold out but offering a waitlist option.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 member access with no crowds or wait times
Premium Uneekor simulator technology providing high-fidelity data for serious improvement
Two private simulator bays at the flagship location with an elevated clubhouse atmosphere
Membership works at both locations for maximum flexibility
Discounted lessons and access to member events and leagues

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, but pro shop available
Beer and wine available at the FGX Pro Shop in the Flagship location

simulator_hardware.notes: High-fidelity ball tracking and club data at both locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but premium clubs and equipment are also provided in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the FGX Pro Shop at the Flagship location serves beer and wine for members and guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified, but sessions can be booked in 1-hour previews or booked by members via the app for any time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Future Country Club is a members-only indoor golf club focused on adult golfers and does not appear to cater to children.
